title: Armor Trim Effects
description: A Datapack which adds special effects to Armor Trims based on the material used
body:
# ARMOR TRIM EFFECTS
This Data Pack introduces some new small effects for using Trims on your armor!\
This Data Pack also doubles as a **Resource Pack** which will display the Stat Benefits on Trimmed Armor!\
Just Copy and Paste the Data Pack into your Resource Pack folder and activate it!
# Translations (Thanks!)
RU: **ytrbqdkflbvbhy** 

## Effects
For each piece of armor equipped with a specific **Trim Material**, gain:
- **Amethyst**: 0.5 Luck
- **Copper**: 0.75 Block Interaction Range
- **Diamond**: 1.5 Armor, 0.5 Armor Toughness
- **Emerald**: 1 Level of Hero of the Village
- **Gold**: 10% Mining Speed
- **Iron**: 5% Attack Damage, 7.5% Attack Speed
- **Lapis**: 25% More Experience from Orbs
- **Netherite**: 10% Reduced Time on Fire
- **Quartz**: +1 Safe Fall Distance, 15% Reduced Fall Damage
- **Redstone**: 5% Movement Speed, 15% Sneaking Speed
- **Resin**: 15% Knockback Resistance
